results.name: hashmap_get_expect
results.rationale: Receiver State has two Vec<i64> at 0..0x30 (per drop_in_place::source::State which calls RawVec::drop on both halves), HashMap<i64, i64> at 0x30..0x60 (ctrl/bucket_mask/growth_left/hash_builder reads + 16-byte bucket stride confirms (i64, i64)), bool at 0x60 compared with side_flag.
